title: Tech Sector Volume Spike With Muted Price Change
thesis: A sudden 30%+ spike in daily volume without a corresponding 1% price move suggests accumulation or distribution, often preceding a directional breakout. Volume spikes with flat price often indicate institutional positioning in technology stocks.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily volume and price for XLK
signal_logic: Enter long if daily volume is 30% higher than 20-day average and price change is between -0.5% and +0.5%
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long if daily volume is 30% higher than 20-day average and price change is between -0.5% and +0.5% Exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if price drops more than 2% from entry
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily volume and price for XLK via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Volume spikes without price moves happen regularly in XLK due to sector rotation and news cycles.

schema.idea: Tech sector volume spike with muted price change

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily volume and price for XLK

schema.behavior: A sudden 30%+ spike in daily volume without a corresponding 1% price move suggests accumulation or distribution, often preceding a directional breakout.

market_impact.rationale: Volume spikes with flat price often indicate institutional positioning in technology stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if daily volume is 30% higher than 20-day average and price change is between -0.5% and +0.5%
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if price drops more than 2% from entry

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Volume spikes without price moves happen regularly in XLK due to sector rotation and news cycles.

title: Consumer Discretionary Google Trends Surge For Sale Keywords
thesis: A sudden 15%+ weekly increase in search interest for 'sale' often correlates with rising consumer spending and positive momentum in discretionary stocks. Higher consumer interest in sales can indicate upcoming retail strength.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly data for 'sale' keyword in US
signal_logic: Enter long if weekly 'sale' search interest rises more than 15% vs prior week
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long if weekly 'sale' search interest rises more than 15% vs prior week Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if XLY drops 3% from entry
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly data for 'sale' keyword in US via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data frequently shows spikes in consumer interest around holidays and promotions.

title: Energy Sector Weekly Drawdown Exhaustion
thesis: After a 3-week consecutive decline totaling more than 8%, a reversal week with a smaller loss or gain often signals short-term bottoming. Energy sector tends to mean revert after sharp multi-week declines.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLE
signal_logic: Enter long if XLE drops 3 consecutive weeks totaling >8% and then weekly loss is <2% or positive
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long if XLE drops 3 consecutive weeks totaling >8% and then weekly loss is <2% or positive Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or a 5% gain is realized
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLE via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy volatility and drawdowns are common, creating regular opportunities for this pattern.

data.source: Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLE

schema.behavior: After a 3-week consecutive decline totaling more than 8%, a reversal week with a smaller loss or gain often signals short-term bottoming.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector tends to mean revert after sharp multi-week declines.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long if XLE drops 3 consecutive weeks totaling >8% and then weekly loss is <2% or positive
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or a 5% gain is realized

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy volatility and drawdowns are common, creating regular opportunities for this pattern.

title: Financial Sector Momentum Divergence With Spy

data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily returns for XLF and SPY
signal_logic: Enter long XLF when 10-day momentum >0 and SPY 10-day momentum <0
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLF when 10-day momentum >0 and SPY 10-day momentum <0 Exit: Exit if XLF momentum turns negative or SPY momentum turns positive

implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily returns for XLF and SPY via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Momentum divergences between sectors and SPY occur regularly in volatile markets.

title: Staples Sector Drawdown Rapid Recovery
thesis: When XLP falls 3%+ in 3 days but bounces back 1%+ on the 4th day, it often signals short-term oversold relief. Consumer staples often see quick mean reversion after sharp short-term selloffs.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLP
signal_logic: Enter long XLP on day 4 if prior 3-day loss >3% and day 4 gains >1%
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLP on day 4 if prior 3-day loss >3% and day 4 gains >1% Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if price falls 2% from entry
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLP via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Staples experience frequent short-term selloffs and rebounds in volatile environments.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLP

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples often see quick mean reversion after sharp short-term selloffs.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLP on day 4 if prior 3-day loss >3% and day 4 gains >1%
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if price falls 2% from entry

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Staples experience frequent short-term selloffs and rebounds in volatile environments.

title: Utilities Sector Negative Price Gap Fill
thesis: A gap down of more than 1.5% that fills (closes back above previous day's close) within 3 days often leads to short-term rallies. Gap fills signal short-term demand overcoming initial sell pressure in utilities.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLU
signal_logic: Enter long XLU when a gap down >1.5% on day 1 is filled by close within 3 days
entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLU when a gap down >1.5% on day 1 is filled by close within 3 days Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if XLU drops 2% from entry
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.

implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLU via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Gap down and fill patterns happen frequently in utilities due to sector defensiveness.

title: Consumer Staples Sector Weekly Weather Temperature Spike
thesis: A 10%+ weekly increase in average temperature during colder months correlates with a short-term dip in staples due to reduced heating product demand. Warmer weather reduces demand for certain consumer staples like heating fuels and warm beverages.
data_sources: Open-Meteo daily temperature averaged weekly for major US metro areas
signal_logic: Enter short XLP if weekly average temperature rises >10% compared to prior week in winter months (Nov-Feb)
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLP if weekly average temperature rises >10% compared to prior week in winter months (Nov-Feb) Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if XLP rallies 3%
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.

implementation_notes: Use Open-Meteo daily temperature averaged weekly for major US metro areas via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weather fluctuations happen regularly and impact staples seasonally.
